posts.text: People in Bolivia are becoming increasingly desperate. For a month protesters have blocked the roads into the country’s seat of government. They are demanding the president resign https://www.economist.com/the-americas/2026/06/04/protesters-have-controlled-bolivias-capital-for-a-month?taid=6a22db14b189380001a03dc4&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $61,000, now down -$18,000 in 10 days.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
If the KOSPI drops to levels last seen a few weeks ago, their entire financial system will fail, and they’ll probably need an IMF bailout. 

Governments used to try and avoid bubbles because of the consequences. Now, governments just blow bigger bubbles to bail out the prior ones…
posts.author: hkuppy
